name: The Meeting That Could Have Been an Email
text:
All players stop. The meeting begins. It does not need to begin but it has begun. Nothing on any battlefield happens while the meeting is happening, and the meeting is happening.
Go around the table. Each player says one thing that could have been an email. When a player runs out of things, time was supposed to resume, but someone says "before we wrap, one quick thing," and it does not.
This sorcery does not leave the stack. It is recurring. It recurs. You will be invited again.
flavorText: Subject: Re: quick sync. Duration: the heat death of the universe.

extras.timingGag: for as long as you keep talking
